message:
fix(service): re-apply buffer pending counter leak fix after merge

The fix from commit 192c361c was overwritten during merge conflict
resolution. Re-applying: when inner service poll_ready returns Err,
decrement pending counter and wake ready_wakers before transitioning
to Error state. Without this, each such error permanently leaks one
buffer slot, leading to deadlock after `capacity` errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
